headline: PSE&G: Extreme Weather Doesn't Take Holidays, Our Storm Response Didn't Either
summary: PSE&G knows that losing power—especially during high heat—is difficult for customers and their families. Following a week of extreme weather that included a multi-day heat dome and winds in excess of 70 mph, we are grateful and thank customers for the patience they showed throughout one of the most devastating and extended storm events in our history. As service was restored across New Jersey, for one of the largest restoration efforts in PSE&G history, thousands of PSE&G employees, contractors
